message:
test(proptest): pct_change reconstruction helpers for DataFrame parity

crates/fp-conformance/tests/proptest_properties.rs (+184)
  * New proptest helpers for verifying `Series::pct_change()` and
    `DataFrame::pct_change()` parity against a reconstructed oracle
    built from `Series::diff` + `Series::shift`:

      - `reconstruct_pct_change_scalar(delta, previous) -> Scalar`
        one-step reconstruction of pct_change = diff / previous:
          * if either side is missing → Null(NaN)
          * else try to coerce both to f64 and divide.

      - `reconstruct_pct_change_series(series, periods) -> Series`
        reconstructs the full Series by pairing
        `series.diff(periods)` with `series.shift(periods)` and
        calling `reconstruct_pct_change_scalar` elementwise.

  * These helpers are wired into two new property tests that
    assert for every (series_strategy, periods ∈ 1..=4) pair:
      - `series.pct_change(periods)` equals the reconstruction
        (within `approx_equal_dataframe`'s tolerance on finite
        values; exact match on missing-ness);
      - identity under periods=0 holds: pct_change(0) =
        diff(0)/shift(0) = 0 on every non-null row.

  * Exports the helpers at module scope so the DataFrame-side
    proptests can reuse them column-by-column.

No production code change — all additions are `#[cfg(test)]`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
